retention_reason: Preserve non-canonical but still useful whole-run Guardians review runs outside the repo so future tuning can revisit them without recreating the captures.
notes: Canonical current whole-run payloads that are small enough and important enough for durable Git-backed retention should still use private-storage.json and the private companion repo.
This iCloud bucket is for larger in-use review residue that should remain available across MacBooks without staying in the workspace or bloating GitHub.
